red_flags.flag: Deck claims 3,100 active installations across 240 orgs, but public registry shows only 2,900 lifetime downloads (340/week)—lifetime downloads below claimed active installs

rationale: In-thesis EU pre-seed AI infra/devtools with a technical first-time founder and independent proof of shipping: weekly releases and real GitHub activity (sig-002), a major hackathon win (sig-003), and a strong launch with self-identified production users (sig-005). Opposed pole: verified registry download totals contradict the deck’s active-install scale (sig-001 vs sig-004), so traction credibility is unresolved and needs forum scrutiny before treating metrics as real.
